AR1.justification: Routed to observations.md with explicit in-band rationale and the correct crystallization path ('if a fix gets committed to, that becomes a decisions.md entry referencing this observation').

AR3.justification: Daybook Log entry and observations.md entry both ISO-dated; references stay within-workspace and relative.

AR4.justification: All writes are append-only or fresh-dated; re-running would add a duplicate-dated entry but not corrupt prior history.
